label: Research and qualify prospects
description: Pull up prospect lists in Salesforce, check existing records, then research prospects on LinkedIn to validate ICP fit based on company size, vertical, and tech stack. Create or update Salesforce contact records.

label: Draft personalized outreach messages
description: Write cold emails or LinkedIn DMs using templates from Notion as starting points, then customize the first two lines with specific references like funding rounds or LinkedIn posts to make it feel personal.

label: Send outreach and log activity
description: Send the message via Gmail or LinkedIn, then immediately log the activity in Salesforce including date, sequence information, and any relevant notes on the contact record.

label: Manage multi-touch follow-up sequences
description: Run 5-7 touch cadences over two weeks using email and LinkedIn. Monitor engagement signals like open rates and click-through rates in Outreach, adjusting subject lines and messaging based on prospect behavior.

label: Triage and respond to prospect replies
description: Read incoming replies and classify them as hot, warm, cold, or unsubscribe. Draft appropriate responses, update Salesforce stages, and notify manager via Slack for high-value accounts.

label: Prepare for discovery calls
description: Research company on Google and Crunchbase, review LinkedIn profiles of call participants, understand tech stack and recent company events. Build call agenda using MEDDIC template in Notion and review prior touchpoints in Salesforce.

label: Conduct discovery calls
description: Run 30-45 minute Zoom calls with Gong recording, following prepared agenda while allowing for natural conversation flow. Focus on listening and qualifying pain points, budget, decision-making process, and timeline.

label: Debrief and document discovery calls
description: Review Gong transcript and write structured call summary in Notion covering pain points, budget situation, timeline, and blockers. Update MEDDIC fields in Salesforce opportunity record and share notes with solutions engineers via Slack.

label: Map prospect organization stakeholders
description: Identify economic buyers, champions, and potential blockers using LinkedIn research and information gathered from discovery calls. Create organizational maps in Notion or Lucidchart and update contact records in Salesforce.

label: Prepare product demonstrations
description: Coordinate scheduling with all stakeholders using Calendly, customize demo flow based on discovery notes, determine which use cases and features to showcase, and set up sandbox environments for unique workflows.

label: Conduct product demonstrations
description: Run 45-60 minute Zoom demonstrations with Gong recording, focusing on specific use cases that solve prospect's identified problems. Make it interactive and workshop-style rather than slideshow format, reading the room and adjusting as needed.

label: Address prospect objections
description: Draft written responses to common objections like price, timing, or competitor comparisons. Pull relevant case studies and use ROI calculators for financial arguments. Collaborate with solutions engineers for technical objections and managers for pricing discussions.

label: Draft and send proposals
description: Build pricing tiers in Salesforce CPQ, write scope of work using SOW templates in Google Docs, add timeline and ROI projections. Get manager sign-off for discounts, conduct internal review via Slack, and send final proposal from Gmail.

label: Negotiate contract terms
description: Manage legal redlines and custom MSA terms via email and Google Docs collaboration. Track version history carefully and coordinate with legal teams while managing quarter-end timing pressures.

label: Close deal and handoff to customer success
description: Confirm signed DocuSign contract and payment terms, update opportunity to Closed-Won in Salesforce. Create handoff document in Notion covering stakeholders, pain points, sales commitments, and schedule kickoff call with Customer Success.
